text.title: reasoning-first-architectures Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for reasoning-first-architectures as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Models produce plausible-sounding reasoning steps that are wrong; the reasoning trace is not causally connected to the output.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Exploring N paths × M evaluation steps multiplies LLM calls; even a 3-path ToT with 5 evaluation rounds costs 15 calls per query.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Self-evaluation by the same model that generated the output has low recall for the model's own failure modes.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The plan is correct at creation time but becomes invalid after unexpected tool results mid-execution.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The generator is anchored to its first output; revisions tend to be surface-level rather than structural.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Claude's extended thinking mode uses thinking tokens that count against the context window and are billed; naive use on every request is expensive.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Models produce syntactically valid Thought steps that are factually wrong. Reasoning text is not ground truth — always verify final outputs against an external check when possible.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: In ReAct, models can produce multi-paragraph Thought blocks that consume most of the context window before taking any action. Cap reasoning length with max_tokens on the thinking portion.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ToT with backtracking can explore exponentially many paths. Set a hard cap on total nodes (e.g. 20) and prune aggressively below the score threshold.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Asking the same model to critique its own output has low recall for its own failure modes. Use a second model or a rule-based verifier as critic when possible.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: For Planning Loops that will take irreversible actions (writes, sends, deploys), surface the plan to a human for review before execution begins. The reasoning-first architecture makes this natural — the plan is an artifact that can be inspected before any action.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Claude's thinking tokens are billed at the same rate as output tokens. A naive "think before every step" prompt on a high-traffic agent can double costs. Gate extended thinking to complex subtasks only.
